title: baeothryon rigidum
intro: Baeothryon rigidum, also known as rock lavender or prickly lavender, is a perennial plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. Baeothryon rigidum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in salves and ointments to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
